pr-Sector Partners

Our department has sectoral cooperation with Support to Life Association, Aristo Communication PR Agency, Şeyda Taluk Education and Consultancy and Digital Media Research Association (NewsLabTurkey).

Our department is also in close cooperation with the Association of Communication Consultancy Companies, Reputation Management Institute, Corporate Social Responsibility Association of Turkey, Public Relations Association of Turkey, Panasonic Life Solutions and Akademetre and guides its graduates on various job and internship alternatives.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)

Aristo is an award-winning, young and dynamic 360-degree creative communication consultancy agency, a member of PRGN, who believes in creative communication philosophy with their expertise in public relations, media communication and publishing. With Artful, the in-house agency, they offer social media and creative works for Turkey’s and the world’s leading brands.

Support to Life (Hayata Destek) is an independent humanitarian organization founded with the principle aim of helping disaster affected communities meet their basic needs and rights. They are active since 2005 with principles of humanity, impartiality, neutrality, independence and accountability. Currently, their primary areas of work are Emergency Assistance, Refugee Support, Child Protection in Seasonal Agriculture and Capacity Building.

Şeyda Taluk

Şeyda Taluk provides consultancy services in political and social communication, leadership communication, lobbying, and stakeholder engagement ranging from politics to NGOs, from local governments to the business world. She shares the experience and knowledge she has accumulated in these fields through various corporate training, conferences, and seminars.

NewsLabTurkey

NewsLabTurkey aims to train corporate and individual actors in the Turkish journalism industry and future journalists on journalism practices and keep them informed of developments in this field.
